name: Education
description: How knowledge and skills are transmitted, developed, and evaluated.

LRN.name: Learning Science
LRN.description: How learning works — cognitive load, memory, retrieval practice, motivation

EDU.name: Education Policy
EDU.description: School systems, curriculum, assessment, equity, comparative education

HED.name: Higher Education
HED.description: University systems, research function, credentialing, student debt, access

SKL.name: Skills & Development
SKL.description: Vocational training, adult learning, workforce development, skill assessment

fragment_rules.source_requirements: Must cite peer-reviewed education research, government data (DoE, OECD), or established academic journals.
fragment_rules.philosophy_guard: Fragments must describe educational mechanisms and outcomes descriptively, not advocate for specific policy prescriptions.
